ocr_findings.description: '出る順！過去問&完全解説' in the image (with exclamation mark ！) is rendered as '（出る順 / 過去問&完全解説）' in OCR — the ！ is replaced by a slash and parentheses added. Occurs on multiple rows. Cosmetic difference, meaning preserved.

reviewer_notes: Table of contents page covering chapters 8–11. Section titles, sub-section codes (08-01 through 11-02), and page numbers all captured correctly. The '出る順！' badge text has a minor rendering difference (slash instead of exclamation, parentheses added) across all occurrences, but no content loss. Page number 'x' at bottom present in image but absent from OCR — negligible.
